texto: The fallacy that dynamic processes must be modeled as if the system is in continuous equilibrium is probably the most important reason for the intellectual failure of neoclassical economics. Mathematics, science and engineering developed tools long ago to model outside of equilibrium processes. This dynamic approach to thinking about the economy should become second nature to economists.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Steve Keen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The fallacy that dynamic processes must be modeled as if the system is in continuous equilibrium …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, 2009, dynamic-processes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dynamic-processes e economics.

Mathematics, science and engineering developed tools long ago to model outside of equilibrium processes. This dynamic approach to thinking about the economy should become second nature to economists.

texto: ...If you look at mainstream economics there are three things you will not find in a mainstream economic model - Banks, Debt, and Money. How anybody can think they can analyze capital while leaving out Banks, Debt, and Money is a bit to me like an ornithologist trying to work out how a bird flies whilst ignoring that the bird has wings...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Steve Keen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “...If you look at mainstream economics there are three things you will not find in a mainstream e…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, banking, debt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e debt.

texto: We should look closely on what is happening at the moment, guys with little moustaches can pop up everywhere now given this instable economic situation. A look into history shows us what that could mean.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Steve Keen sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “We should look closely on what is happening at the moment, guys with little moustaches can pop up…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, economics, society, útil em momentos de society.

texto: Have you heard the joke about the chemist, physicist and economist who get wrecked on a desert isle, with a huge supply of canned baked beans as their only food? The chemist says that he can start a fire using the neighbouring palm trees, and calculate the temperature at which a can will explode. The physicist says that she can work out the trajectory of each of the baked beans, so that they can be collected and eaten. The economist says "Hang on guys, you're doing it the hard way. Let's assume we have a can opener.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Steve Keen que provoca temas ligados a trabalho. Ao questionar “Have you heard the joke about the chemist, physicist and economist who get wrecked on a desert is…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, chemist, economics, com foco em trabalho e economics.
